description: Profit.co provides AI-powered performance management, OKR, and strategic execution software for organizations. Its platform covers goals, reviews, tasks, portfolios, and related workplace planning and engagement workflows.
summary: Profit.co exposes a documented HTTP API at `api.profit.co/app/dao/v6` authenticated by an API key plus access key, and an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://integrations.profit.co/mcp`.
